mapper.select: select id, config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time from sys_config where config_key = #{configKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_config (config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time) values (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_config set config_value = #{configValue}, description = #{description}, update_time = now() where config_key = #{configKey}
